message:
Add generate_completions function and tests for shell completion scripts

- Add generate_completions() function that returns completion script as String
- Add comprehensive unit tests for bash, zsh, fish, powershell, and elvish
- Tests verify scripts contain expected shell-specific content
- Fix clippy warning: to_clap_shell now takes self by value (Shell is Copy)

Closes rust_proxy-zap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
